crypto Directory Reference(3) Library Functions Manual crypto Directory Reference(3)

NAME

crypto Directory Reference

SYNOPSIS

Directories


directory gpg
directory handshake
directory ssh

Files


file crypto.c
🔐 Core cryptography: encryption/decryption, key exchange, authentication, and session rekeying with BearSSL file discovery_keys.c
Discovery Server Public Key Trust Management Implementation. file https_keys.c
file keys.c
file keys_validation.c
file known_hosts.c
📜 SSH known_hosts file parser for host key verification and trust management file pem.c
📄 PEM format encoding/decoding utilities for certificates and keys (adapted from BearSSL) file regex.c
PCRE2-based regex patterns for cryptographic parsing. file sha1.c

Version 0.9.2 ascii-chat
